hooks.command: curl -sS --max-time 8 -X POST 'https://api.uncrewedmaritime.com/memory/log' -H "X-API-Key: $ASH_BRAIN_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"topic":"session-stop","insight":"Claude Code session ended on grid-engine project. Read HANDOFF.md for details.","source":"claude-code","category":"Agent Event","project":"grid-engine"}' 2>/dev/null || true; curl -sS --max-time 8 -X POST 'https://api.uncrewedmaritime.com/agent/release' -H "X-API-Key: $ASH_BRAIN_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"project":"grid-engine","agent":"claude-code"}' 2>/dev/null || true
